task_summary: Google Slides API export — user clicks 'Export to Google Slides' after conversation, structured outline gets created as a Google Slides presentation in their Drive.
current_status: PR open, functionally working, needs UX polish before merge
what_works: Server endpoint POST /export/google-slides creates presentations via 2 Google API calls
All 5 slide types (title, content, code, metrics, closing) map correctly to Google Slides layouts
Re-auth modal shows when provider_token is missing/expired with clear context
Export button replaces old HTML download in SlidePreview toolbar
Beckham tested and confirmed: export creates Google Slides successfully
Google Cloud Console configured: Slides API enabled, drive.file scope added, app published to production

remaining_work.issue: Slide preview shows polished CSS (geometric shapes, accent treatments, decorative elements) but Google Slides export outputs clean structured content only. This mismatch could mislead users into thinking the export will look like the preview.
options: Option A (recommended): Add a visual note near the export button like 'Exports structure and content — customize the design in Google Slides'. Quick, honest, minimal code change.
Option B: Simplify the slide preview to be more of an outline view that matches what the export actually produces. Bigger change, removes the polished CSS work from TASK-018.
remaining_work.beckham_preference: Discussed both options. No explicit pick yet — next agent should confirm with Beckham.

key_files.role: SlideData[] → Google Slides API request builder (create + batchUpdate)
Slide preview panel — toolbar has ExportButton
Updated OAuth to request drive.file scope
OLD HTML export — no longer imported, can be deleted as cleanup

code_review_findings_addressed: prompt:consent removed from initial login (only on re-auth)
Toast shown on non-reauth export failures
decisions_made_this_session: Product positioning shifted from 'for software engineers' to 'outline-first presentations through guided conversation'
Google Slides export chosen over PPTX/PDF — uses existing Google OAuth, zero-friction UX
drive.file scope (non-sensitive) — avoids Google verification process
v1 simplified: no token storage/refresh — re-auth modal if token expired
HTML export removed entirely — Google Slides is the primary export
Login page redesigned with Hero 3 layout (PR #13, merged)
Slide preview stays as-is for now — just needs expectation-setting copy near export button
related_completed_tasks: TASK-019 (login page redesign) — merged via PR #13

done: App published on OAuth consent screen

recommended_first_action: Confirm with Beckham which option for the preview/export mismatch (Option A: add note near export button, or Option B: simplify preview). Implement the chosen fix, then proceed through remaining task lifecycle gates: commit fix → code review → update PR → Beckham merges → close task → deploy.
